purpose: Fresh remaining-lane selection audit after Pass 72 confirmed outcome_satisfaction is driver-exhausted. Evaluate the four remaining broad-disagreement lanes to select the next benchmark-facing lane.

lanes_audited.reason: Pass 70 and Pass 72 both confirmed this. Remaining 12 rows break into 3 already-recovered extra_theme rows, 5 recommendation/generic-praise non-drivers, 2 service-or-outcome-or-expectation overlap rows, and 2 too-subjective or too-weak rows. No unrecovered phrase candidates remain.
lanes_audited.action: stop — do not reopen without new evidence

rows_reviewed.text_anchor: took the time to explain all of our choices
never got proper legal help
came up with a plan
disappointed in the entire process
pushed for me to accept a settlement worth a third of what I was entitled to
ran my SSI for medical issues and not mental health like I asked
rows_reviewed.note: Explicit instruction-reversal. The only genuine new phrase seed in the lane.

rows_reviewed.text_anchor: wasn't fully explained
huge headache
blamed for not coming in when that's what I wanted

lanes_audited.reason: 3 extra_theme rows are already recovered. Row 82 is the only genuine new seed — explicit instruction-reversal language. Everything else is vague, wrong-lane, or intake boundary. One candidate is too thin to justify a lane pass.
lanes_audited.action: stop — one candidate is insufficient for a truth-shaping pass

rows_reviewed.text_anchor: responsive
lost his temper
lack of communication
rows_reviewed.note: Real responsiveness pressure. Phrase is short — needs tight guard before adding.

rows_reviewed.text_anchor: people picking up the phone are very nice
they communicate well what information is needed
my attorney would always say they were waiting
rows_reviewed.note: Explicit chronic non-responsiveness narrative. Strong anchor for a narrow engine phrase.

rows_reviewed.text_anchor: person on the phone got every little detail... only to be told they won't take my case
Waited 2 years and only heard from them 2 or 3 times
rudely accused of not saying anything like that over the phone

lanes_audited.reason: Row 107 ('my attorney would always say they were waiting') is the clearest chronic non-responsiveness anchor. Row 88 ('lack of communication') is real but short and needs a guard before adding. The remaining rows are generic, wrong-lane, or already-covered. Two candidates is the minimum threshold for a truth-shaping pass.
lanes_audited.action: proceed — write a truth-shaping prep artifact as the next pass before any engine work

rows_reviewed.text_anchor: stayed in contact with me the entire time
wasn't fully explained
won't explain why and give you the run around
communication from staff was by far the worst

lanes_audited.reason: 4 of 8 rows are already-recovered extra_theme. Real missing_theme pressure is sparse: rows 105 and 110 have genuine clarity gaps but both also appear in other lanes (expectation_setting and communication_responsiveness respectively). The lane is thin and overlapping — weaker than communication_responsiveness.
lanes_audited.action: stop — revisit after communication_responsiveness truth-shaping is complete

selection_rationale: communication_responsiveness has the clearest row-backed phrase candidates (107, 88) and the fewest wrong-lane contaminations after removing the trust, office-staff, and generic-positive rows. The anchor phrase at row 107 is strong enough to seed a narrow truth-shaping prep artifact. A lane-selection audit alone is not sufficient to move to engine work — a truth-shaping pass is required first, same pattern as all prior lanes.
explicitly_not_next: expectation_setting — one candidate is too thin for a pass
communication_clarity — too thin and overlaps with the selected lane
